tech: Portable Chrome, Batch Scripting, CORS Bypass Config, User Data Management
title: DTL - Portable Google Chrome (No CORS)
description: Configured a portable Google Chrome browser with a custom user data directory that disables CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) restrictions. This development tool allows internal web applications to be tested with cross-origin requests enabled, bypassing browser security policies for development and debugging purposes. The portable setup requires no installation and can be run from a USB drive.
company: DhakaThai AlcoMaxx PLC / TIC Accessories Inc.

images.title: Portable Chrome Setup
images.desc: Custom portable Chrome configuration with no-CORS flags for cross-origin development testing.
